summary: Iteration 118: Complete testing of Backup/Restore UPSERT logic fix. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). The fix correctly prevents duplicate records when restoring backups - restoring twice now UPDATES existing records instead of creating duplicates. Response fields now include 'total_inserted', 'total_updated', 'total_errors' instead of old 'total_restored', 'total_skipped'.

restore_response_fields.result: PASS - Response contains total_inserted, total_updated, total_errors, message, details

restore_details_per_collection.result: PASS - Each collection in details has inserted, updated, errors counts

upsert_no_duplicates.test: Restoring same backup twice does NOT duplicate records
upsert_no_duplicates.result: PASS - First restore: inserted=1, Second restore: inserted=0, updated=1. Count remains 1 (no duplicates)

upsert_updates_data.test: UPSERT actually updates data on second restore
upsert_updates_data.result: PASS - Data is updated from 'Original Name' to 'Updated Name From Backup' without duplicating

full_cycle_test.test: Full cycle: insert -> export -> modify -> restore -> verify update
full_cycle_test.result: PASS - Commessa modified in DB was correctly restored from backup, count=1 (no duplicates)

company_settings_pk.test: company_settings uses user_id as PK for upsert
company_settings_pk.result: PASS - Restoring company_settings twice keeps count=1, data updated

export_endpoint.result: PASS - Returns 200, valid JSON with metadata/data/stats structure

new_record_insert.test: New records (not existing) are INSERTED correctly
new_record_insert.result: PASS - Brand new client inserted, inserted=1, record exists in DB

catalogo_profili_pk.test: catalogo_profili uses 'codice' as PK for upsert
catalogo_profili_pk.result: PASS - Restoring twice with same codice keeps count=1

upsert_logic_verified.upsert_behavior: update_one with {pk_field: doc[pk_field], user_id: uid}, upsert=True
upsert_logic_verified.result_counting: upserted_id set = inserted, modified_count > 0 or identical doc = updated

test_credentials: Created test user 'user_backup_upsert_118' with session 'session_backup_upsert_118_token' - cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Test data created in clients, commesse, company_settings, catalogo_profili collections for upsert testing - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 118 fixed backup restore duplication bug. The restore_backup function in /app/backend/routes/backup.py now uses update_one with upsert=True instead of find_one + insert_one. Primary keys for each collection are mapped in _get_pk_field() function. Response fields changed from total_restored/total_skipped to total_inserted/total_updated/total_errors. The old test file test_iteration101_backup.py may have some outdated assertions (expects total_restored/total_skipped) but core backup functionality tests are still valid.
